```python
def realcompare(a, b):
    if a == b:
        return "EQ"
    if math.isinf(a):
        return "GT" if a > 0 else "LT"
    if math.isinf(b):
        return "LT" if b > 0 else "GT"
    
    def round6(v):
        if v == 0.0:
            return 0.0
        n = int(math.floor(math.log10(abs(v))))
        return round(v, 5 - n)
    
    a6 = round6(a)
    b6 = round6(b)
    
    if a6 == b6:
        return "EQ"
    elif a6 < b6:
        return "LT"
    else:
        return "GT"
```

This is simpler and equivalent to the scaling approach.
